title: Log Three Geology Passes
briefing: Drive the survey rover into Tycho, stabilize inside each scan halo, and hold E to log the anomaly. Return to deployment when all three passes are sealed.

objectives.label: Western Rim Shear
objectives.note: Basalt-highland transition on the northwest inner wall.

objectives.label: Floor Breach
objectives.note: Interior flat with ejecta overlays and slumped crater floor material.

objectives.label: Eastern Rim Crest
objectives.note: Brighter uplifted shoulder on the exit rim.

returnZone.label: Deployment Zone
returnZone.note: Return marker at the northwest staging ridge.
